overview: SR University, located in Ananthasagar, Hasanparthy, Warangal, Telangana, is a premier multi-disciplinary private state university established in 2020. Originally founded in 2002 as SR Engineering College (SREC) under the Sri Rajeshwara Educational Society, it was transitioned into a comprehensive private state university to foster world-class technical education. The university spans a modern campus equipped with industry-oriented specializations, advanced research centers, innovation hubs, and global academic collaborations.
accreditation: NAAC Grade 'A'; Approved by UGC and AICTE; First private university in Telangana & Andhra Pradesh to secure ICAR Accreditation for its School of Agriculture. Ranked 91st in India under the Engineering Category in the NIRF 2025 rankings.

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are granted via national and state-level counseling streams (like TS EAPCET/ICET) or through direct institutional evaluation based on competitive test merits.
admissions.importantDates: Admission dates directly mirror state administrative cycles including TS EAPCET counseling maps, JEE Main release windows, and institutional application timetables.

campus.area: Comprehensive state-of-the-art campus integrated in Warangal
campus.specialNote: Annual hostel configurations offer a range of multi-cuisine food services with options including triple and four-sharing formats.

hostelFees.GeneralHostelRange: ₹60,000 – ₹1,00,000 per year (exclusive of certain add-on components)

scholarships.meritScholarships: Financial merit waivers mapped against performance parameters in JEE Main, TS EAPCET, and board examinations.
scholarships.fullWaiver: Top state rankers and exceptional national test performers qualify for up to 100% tuition coverage.
scholarships.partialWaiver: Sports quota exemptions, alumni family assistance, and progressive tuition reductions ranging from 25% to 50%.
scholarships.governmentAid: Full integration with Telangana state welfare initiatives including TS ePASS reimbursement pathways for eligible categories.
